use_cases: Toggle boolean settings on or off in configuration panels
Enable or disable features in application preferences
Collect binary yes/no responses in forms
Switch between active and inactive states in settings menus
Create interactive on/off controls for feature flags
ai_summary: A lightweight toggle switch component built on Base UI's switch primitive with smooth thumb translation and scale animations on interaction. Features CSS variable-driven sizing for theming, focus-visible accessibility rings, and disabled state styling. The switch includes press feedback through scale transforms and supports both checked and unchecked states with automatic background color transitions.
